to.shell_command: /usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key up shift'

rules.description: Caps+Backspace -> Delete first character of previous two-character word

to.shell_command: /usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key up shift'

rules.description: Caps+(Shift)+Semicolon -> Insert semicolon/colon at end of line

to.shell_command: /usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key up shift'

rules.description: Caps+Quote -> Insert colon at end of line

to.shell_command: /usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key up shift'

rules.description: Caps+V -> Paste as Plain Text, Caps+Shift+V -> Advanced Paste

to.shell_command: /bin/sleep 0.1; /usr/bin/osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key code 8 using {command down}'
